topic: Eccentric contractions — superior for muscle hypertrophy
caption: Did you know that slowing down your workouts can actually make them more effective? 🏋️‍♀️ Eccentric contractions, where you lengthen your muscles under load, are superior for building muscle mass. 💪 Here are the facts: Eccentric contractions increase muscle damage, which stimulates growth. 🌟 They also improve muscle strength and joint health. 🤸‍♀️ Incorporate eccentric exercises into your routine, like lowering weights slowly or using resistance bands. 🌈 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕 #eccentriccontractions #musclehypertrophy #fitnessmotivation #workouttips #healthyliving #musclebuilding #exerciseScience #fitnesseducation
